title: tanacetum polycephalum subsp. argyrophyllum
intro: Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. argyrophyllum, also known as the silver-leaved pyrethrum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum polycephalum subsp. argyrophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its essential oil is often used in aromatherapy and as an insect repellent.
